# Master Todo List: 100% R multivarious Feature Parity

**Last Updated**: 2025-07-13  
**Current Progress**: 48.8% complete (21/43 tasks from plan.md)  
**Focus**: R multivarious v0.2.0 feature parity ONLY - no additional features

## Current Status: Phase 4 (Multiblock Analysis) - Starting

### ✅ COMPLETED PHASES
- **Phase 0**: Foundation Setup (100% - 4 tasks) ✅
- **Phase 1**: Core Linear Algebra (100% - 6 tasks) ✅  
- **Phase 2**: Core Projection System (100% - 4 tasks) ✅
- **Phase 3**: PCA Implementation (100% - 7 tasks) ✅

### 🔄 CURRENT TASK
**T401: Block Management System** (Phase 4 start)
- [ ] Design block structure for multiblock datasets
- [ ] Implement block indexing and slicing
- [ ] Create block iterator and accessor methods
- [ ] Add block validation and consistency checks

## REMAINING HIGH PRIORITY TASKS

### 📋 Phase 4: Multiblock Analysis (Critical Gap)
**Status**: 0% complete (7 tasks) - BLOCKING R function coverage
- [ ] **T401**: Block Management System (3 days)
- [ ] **T402**: Multiblock Projector Base (4 days)  
- [ ] **T411**: Consensus Analysis Foundation (5 days)
- [ ] **T412**: Advanced Consensus Testing (7 days)
- [ ] **T413**: Cross-block correlation analysis
- [ ] **T414**: Sequential component testing
- [ ] **T415**: Block weight calculations

### 📋 Phase 5: Classification and Regression (Critical Gap)  
**Status**: 0% complete (4 tasks) - BLOCKING discriminant analysis
- [ ] **T501**: Discriminant Projector (4 days)
- [ ] **T502**: Classification Framework (3 days)
- [ ] **T511**: Cross Projector (CCA-style) (5 days)
- [ ] **T512**: Regression prediction methods

### 📋 Phase 6: Cross-Language Validation (Critical for Parity)
**Status**: 0% complete (4 tasks) - ESSENTIAL for numerical equivalence
- [ ] **T601**: Test Infrastructure (3 days)
- [ ] **T602**: Comprehensive Test Suite (5 days)
- [ ] **T603**: Documentation and Examples (4 days)
- [ ] **T604**: R fixture generation scripts

### 📋 Phase 7: R Function Coverage Audit (NEW - Critical)
**Status**: 0% complete - ESSENTIAL for 100% parity
- [ ] **T701**: Audit all 115 R exported functions vs implemented
- [ ] **T702**: Identify and implement missing functions  
- [ ] **T703**: Verify all 106 S3 methods have Rust trait equivalents
- [ ] **T704**: Cross-reference NAMESPACE vs Rust lib.rs exports

### 📋 Phase 8: Final Documentation
**Status**: 0% complete (2 tasks)
- [ ] **T801**: R-to-Rust migration guide with 1:1 function mapping
- [ ] **T802**: Performance benchmarks vs R baselines

## SUCCESS CRITERIA FOR 100% FEATURE PARITY

### Functional Completeness
- [ ] All 115 exported R functions implemented (**PRIMARY GOAL**)
- [ ] All 106 S3 methods have Rust trait equivalents
- [ ] Cross-validation tests pass within 1e-12 tolerance
- [ ] No missing functionality from R library

### R Function Categories (from feature_parity.md)
- [ ] **Projector System**: project(), reconstruct(), transpose()
- [ ] **Bidirectional Projector**: scores, loadings, sdev  
- [ ] **PCA Functions**: prcomp() equivalent, rotation methods
- [ ] **Multiblock Analysis**: multiblock consensus, cross-block correlation
- [ ] **Preprocessing**: center(), scale(), standardize()
- [ ] **SVD Wrapper**: Multiple SVD backends
- [ ] **Discriminant Analysis**: LDA prediction methods
- [ ] **Permutation Testing**: Vitale et al. methodology

## QUICK RESUME COMMANDS
- "go to next feature in todo list" → Current: T401 (Block Management System)
- "status check" → Will show current progress and next task
- "what's blocking" → Will identify critical path items

## NOTES
- **NO EXTRA FEATURES**: Only implement what exists in R multivarious
- **Mathematical Equivalence**: All outputs must match R within 1e-12
- **R NAMESPACE**: 115 exported functions is our target coverage
- **Priority Order**: Complete multiblock → classification → validation → audit

---
